title: GCP Cloud Run service
description: Normalized Cloud Run service snapshot, sourced from the Cloud Run Admin API GET /v2/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/services (and revisions). One record per service, keyed by service name. Read-only.

serviceName.description: Short service name (last path segment of the resource name).

latestRevision.description: Latest created/ready revision name, if known.

ready.description: Whether the service's Ready condition is true.

url.description: Public URL of the service, if exposed.
